name: Swedish Cabbage Rolls
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the core out of the cabbage.
2. Blanch the cabbage in salted water (2 teaspoons per quart) until the leaves separate. Remove the stem.
3. Cook the rice in water until the water is just gone, then add milk and finish cooking.
4. Mix the meat, egg, milk, salt, and white pepper together.
5. Take a cabbage leaf and place 2 tablespoons of the meat mixture on one end. Pull the sides over the center and roll it up.
6. Brown the cabbage rolls in butter until golden brown. Turn them over and brown again. Place in a roasting pan.
7. Sprinkle with brown sugar. Deglaze the skillet and add to the pan, then cover with water and a little bouillon.
8. Bake for 1 - 1 1/2 hours at 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
9. Arrange on a platter. Make sauce by mixing 1 1/2 tablespoons flour, salt, and pepper to taste with 1/2 cup cream using the pan juices. Cook until thick and pour over the rolls.
